problem id: 751d48a2
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(4) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(4)

examples:
  11001011 -> 10110000
  11000101 -> 01010000
  11010000 -> 00000001
  01111110 -> 11100000
  11100100 -> 01000000
  11011010 -> 10100001
  00111101 -> 11010000
  01011101 -> 11010000

query: 00000010
predicted answer: 00100000
